title: Editorialist Instagram UGC Fashion Description v2
description: Simplified schema for describing Instagram UGC images for search and tagging.

short_description.description: A 5-7 word concise, keyword-rich description of the image as a whole.

people_description.description: Concise, keyword-rich description of the people in the image (e.g., number, gender, age group, style cues).

items_description.description: Concise, keyword-rich description of all visible clothing items, accessories, and notable fashion details in the image.
